channel.title: Mocha Definition on Home Espresso Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Mocha Definition on Home Espresso Lab

item.title: What Is a Mocha? Definition, Origin, Caffeine, and How It Compares
item.description: A mocha is an espresso drink with chocolate and steamed milk. Here's exactly what's in one, where it came from, how it differs from a latte, hot chocolate, and marocchino, plus the caffeine math.
